1_background.title: Background / Context
1_background.subtitle: Why does this project exist? Who is affected?

2_current_condition.title: Current Condition
2_current_condition.subtitle: How does the process work today? Use data, not opinions.

3_goal.title: Goal / Target Condition
3_goal.subtitle: What does 'done' look like? Be specific and measurable.

4_root_cause.title: Root Cause Analysis
4_root_cause.subtitle: Why does the problem exist? Ask 'why' five times.

5_countermeasures.title: Countermeasures / Proposed Solution
5_countermeasures.subtitle: What are you building? How does it address the root cause?

6_implementation.title: Implementation Plan
6_implementation.subtitle: Milestones, owners, and dates. Who does what by when?

7_followup.title: Follow-Up & Verification
7_followup.subtitle: Did it work? What did you learn? What's next?
